'''ngathuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okay|okay]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okay|okay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngathuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ngæthihith || ngæthihij || ngæthihish || ngæthihi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ngathuthuhuth || ngathuthuhuj || ngathuthuhush || ngathuthuhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ngathuhuth || ngathuhuj || ngathuhush || ngathuhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ngathufhufth || ngathufhufj || ngathufhufsh || ngathufhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngathuhuthu || ngathuhuju || ngathuhushu || ngathuhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngathuhuth || ngathuhuj || ngathuhush || ngathuhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngathuhuthul || ngathuhujul || ngathuhushul || ngathuhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngathuhuuthuthu || ngathuhuujuju || ngathuhuushushu || ngathuhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngathuhuthun || ngathuhujun || ngathuhushun || ngathuhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngathuhuthuoro || ngathuhujuoro || ngathuhushuoro || ngathuhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
